subject: Cloud Computing
title: Netflix: The Cloud Migration Story
description: One-minute skill: Netflix: The Cloud Migration Story.

hook.text: In 2008, Netflix's data center failed and DVDs couldn't ship for three days. That was the last straw.

buildup.text: Netflix decided to move everything to AWS. The migration took seven years to complete.

discovery.text: They built Chaos Monkey, a tool that randomly kills servers to test if the system survives.

twist.text: Netflix now runs entirely on a competitor's cloud. Amazon sells cloud and streams video.

climax.text: Netflix proved that even massive, critical services could run reliably in the public cloud.

punchline.text: Netflix trusts Amazon's cloud. Even though they compete.

quiz.question: What was Netflix's Chaos Monkey designed to do?
options: Randomly kill servers to test system resilience
Monitor customer viewing habits for recommendations
Compress video files for faster streaming
